title: Term Contracts: Nonrenewal
description: Conroe ISD follows specific rules when deciding not to renew an employment contract for a teacher or other staff member who is on a term contract. The policy outlines the reasons the district may choose not to offer a new contract and describes the process employees have to respond or appeal that decision. Understanding these procedures helps the community know that staffing decisions are made through a fair, defined process rather than arbitrarily.
